info.name: GitHub Get All Autolinks of Repository

params.name: owner
params.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

params.name: repo
params.description: The name of the repository without the `.git` extension. The name is not case sensitive.

items.docs:
Gets all autolinks that are configured for a repository.

Information about autolinks are only available to repository administrators.

info.name: GitHub Create an Autolink Reference for Repository

params.name: owner
params.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

params.name: repo
params.description: The name of the repository without the `.git` extension. The name is not case sensitive.

items.docs: Users with admin access to the repository can create an autolink.

info.name: GitHub Get an Autolink Reference of Repository

params.name: owner
params.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

params.name: repo
params.description: The name of the repository without the `.git` extension. The name is not case sensitive.

params.name: autolink_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the autolink.

items.docs:
This returns a single autolink reference by ID that was configured for the given repository.

Information about autolinks are only available to repository administrators.

info.name: GitHub Delete an Autolink Reference from Repository

params.name: owner
params.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

params.name: repo
params.description: The name of the repository without the `.git` extension. The name is not case sensitive.

params.name: autolink_id
params.description: The unique identifier of the autolink.

items.docs:
This deletes a single autolink reference by ID that was configured for the given repository.

Information about autolinks are only available to repository administrators.
